B. Final Percentage Payment 

The plan of care must be signed and dated by a physician or allowed practitioner as 
described who meets the certification and recertification requirements of 42 CFR 424.22 
and before the claim for each 30-day period for services is submitted for the final 
percentage payment. Any changes in the plan of care must be signed and dated
